sourcingNote: Hex colors confirmed from official SVG logo. RGB and CMYK confirmed from official NFL Fact Book. Pantone confirmed by logo slick.
description: The Buffalo Bills are an NFL franchise based in Orchard Park, New York, founded in 1960 as a charter member of the American Football League. They play at Highmark Stadium and compete in the AFC East. The Bills are renowned for their passionate fanbase and reached four consecutive Super Bowls from 1991 to 1994.
